requirement: [Memory Transfer (Host ↔ Device)] Achieve at least 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth for DMA transfers

test_cases.description: Validate if DMA transfers achieve below 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth
preconditions: System with GPU and host machine connected via PCIe
steps: Initiate DMA transfer for a large data set
Calculate percentage of theoretical PCIe bandwidth achieved
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer achieves below 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate if DMA transfers achieve above 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth
preconditions: System with GPU and host machine connected via PCIe
steps: Initiate DMA transfer for a large data set
Calculate percentage of theoretical PCIe bandwidth achieved
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer achieves above 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate DMA transfer performance with a very large data set
preconditions: System with GPU and host machine connected via PCIe
steps: Initiate DMA transfer for a very large data set
Measure actual transfer time and bandwidth
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer completes within expected time and utilizes high bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate DMA transfer performance with a small data set
preconditions: System with GPU and host machine connected via PCIe
steps: Initiate DMA transfer for a small data set
Measure actual transfer time and bandwidth
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer completes within expected time and utilizes appropriate bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate DMA transfer performance in an edge case scenario with low available memory
steps: Initiate DMA transfer for a data set that exceeds available memory
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer handles low memory scenario gracefully without crashing

test_cases.description: Integrate DMA transfer testing with simulation pipeline to validate end-to-end functionality
preconditions: Simulation pipeline configured with GPU simulation
steps: Initiate DMA transfer within simulation pipeline
Verify data integrity and transfer performance
test_cases.expected_result: DMA transfer within simulation pipeline operates correctly and efficiently
